text:
MBA Candidate | Banking and Customer Service Professional
I am an MBA candidate at University Canada West with hands-on experience in banking, finance support, and customer service. My background has helped me build strong skills in financial transaction handling, client service, communication, and professionalism in fast-paced environments.
View Experience Contact Me

title: Home

Professional Profile
I am building my career in the banking and financial services sector. I am especially interested in roles where I can apply my strengths in customer relationship support, transaction accuracy, financial awareness, and service excellence.

title: About
text:
I am currently pursuing my MBA at University Canada West in Vancouver, Canada. I also hold a Bachelor of Laws from the University of London.
My background includes experience in banking, accounting support, and legal research. These experiences helped me develop strong analytical thinking, professionalism, and attention to detail.



My goal is to build a long-term career in banking and financial services. I am particularly interested in roles that involve customer service, financial operations, and professional client relationships.





Accuracy and attention to detail
Strong communication
Professional integrity
Customer-focused mindset
